{{Quote|Tigereye's got more combat experience in his little right toe claw than most Imperial generals.|Lex Kempo|<ref name="AJ8">
{{JournalCite|8|Blaze of Glory (short story)}}</ref>}}
'''Sully Tigereye''' was a [[Trunsk]] who had been a former Elite [[Commando/Legends|Commando]] [[Infiltrator (starfighter)|infiltrator]] unit member with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] serving directly under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Andrephan Stormcaller]] and who followed him to the mercenary group, [[Red Moons]]. At some point in his life, possibly before joining the New Republic, he had been caged, and had possibly been a slave, which was his personal motivation for joining Red Moon.

He was the leader of the mercenary outfit sent to rescue the children of a businessman from the [[Pentastar Alignment]] who wanted to defect to the New Republic. While on [[Gabredor III/Legends|Gabredor III]] he fought hand to hand with the [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] [[Vex (Defel)|Vex]] and tore him to pieces.<ref name="AJ8" />

When he learned of the death of his good friend, [[Lex Kempo]], he was saddened.<ref name="AJ8" />

He was present in [[Nexus City]] on [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]] with Stormcaller, [[Ivey]], and [[Hugo Cutter]] as they planned to disrupt the [[Lunar Night]] festivities.<ref name="AJ4">{{JournalCite|4|It's a Gambler's Life}}</ref>
